templates.title: Destination Sunrise to Sunset Journey
templates.description: Epic 24-hour timelapse journey capturing a destination's transformation from dawn to dusk, showcasing the rhythm of local life

prompt.main: Cinematic sunrise to sunset timelapse journey of [destination]. Open with pre-dawn aerial establishing shot over sleeping city/landscape, transition through morning mist as first light touches landmarks. Follow the awakening of local life - street vendors setting up, morning rituals, rush hour energy. Peak daylight reveals architectural details and natural beauty in full glory. Capture golden hour magic as shadows lengthen, leading to vibrant sunset colors. Close with blue hour cityscape and emerging night lights. Seamless transitions between timeframes using matched camera movements and morphing techniques.

elements.cameraMovement: Hyperlapse tracking shots, smooth aerial orbits, programmed slider movements for consistent motion throughout day cycle
elements.subject: Iconic landmarks, local life rhythms, changing light on architecture and landscapes
elements.scene: Multiple vantage points showcasing destination's character - rooftops, street level, aerial perspectives
elements.motion: Time acceleration showing shadow movements, crowd flows, traffic patterns, cloud formations
elements.lighting: Natural light progression from blue hour through golden hour, emphasizing dramatic sky colors and shadow play
elements.atmosphere: Meditative, awe-inspiring, showcasing destination's daily transformation
elements.style: Planet Earth meets luxury travel cinematography with timelapse mastery

modifiedElements.scene: Focus on skyscrapers, traffic flows, urban energy
modifiedElements.motion: Emphasize city lights, traffic trails, crowd dynamics

modifiedElements.scene: Mountains, beaches, or countryside without urban elements
modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Static wide shots showcasing natural light changes

bestPractices: Scout locations for sunrise/sunset alignments with key landmarks
Use intervalometer for consistent timing between frames
Plan for weather contingencies and multiple shooting days
Color grade to enhance natural light transitions

examples.sampleOutput: Breathtaking timelapse revealing destination's daily transformation with seamless light transitions

templates.title: Cultural Experience Immersion
templates.description: Intimate cultural deep-dive following local traditions, festivals, and authentic daily life experiences

prompt.main: Immersive cultural experience video capturing authentic [culture/tradition]. Open with hands preparing traditional [craft/food/ritual], revealing master artisan's weathered face in natural light. Intercut between wide establishing shots of cultural setting and extreme close-ups of intricate details - textile patterns, spice colors, ceremonial movements. Follow preparation process with respectful observation, capturing genuine moments of concentration, joy, and tradition passing between generations. Include ambient sounds - chanting, market chatter, traditional music. Build to climactic moment of completion/celebration. Close with community sharing the experience together.

elements.cameraMovement: Handheld for intimacy, slow push-ins on details, respectful observation angles avoiding intrusion
elements.subject: Local artisans, traditional ceremonies, authentic cultural practices, multi-generational interactions
elements.scene: Traditional workshops, local homes, sacred spaces, community gathering places
elements.motion: Deliberate craft movements, ceremonial gestures, natural interactions between participants
elements.lighting: Natural available light, warm practicals like candles or lanterns, avoiding harsh artificial lighting
elements.atmosphere: Respectful, authentic, intimate, celebrating cultural heritage
elements.style: Documentary realism with cinematic composition, Anthony Bourdain meets Terrence Malick

technicalSpecs.frameRate: 24 fps with occasional 60fps for slow motion details

modifiedElements.scene: Colorful festival with crowds, costumes, performances
modifiedElements.motion: Dynamic dancing, parade movements, celebration energy

modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Locked off shots, minimal movement for zen feeling

bestPractices: Build trust with subjects before filming
Research cultural protocols and obtain proper permissions
Use longer lenses to maintain respectful distance
Include translator/cultural advisor in production team

examples.sampleOutput: Intimate portrait of traditional craft/ceremony showcasing cultural authenticity with respectful cinematography

templates.title: Adventure Activity Showcase
templates.description: High-energy action sequence capturing extreme sports and adventure activities in spectacular locations

prompt.main: Adrenaline-pumping adventure activity video featuring [activity] in [location]. Open with hero suiting up - close-ups of gear clicking into place, determined eyes, deep breath before action. Cut to wide establishing shot revealing epic scale of environment. Launch into action with dynamic tracking shots - FPV drone racing alongside, 360 camera capturing immersive POV, super slow-motion highlighting key moments of skill and danger. Intercut between multiple angles showing speed, height, technical difficulty. Capture genuine reactions - concentration, exhilaration, triumph. Build tension with near-misses, showcase mastery with smooth execution. Climax with spectacular trick/achievement. End with exhausted but euphoric celebration against stunning backdrop.

elements.cameraMovement: FPV drone flights, cable cam runs, handheld chase shots, gimbal stabilization for smooth action tracking
elements.subject: Extreme sports athletes, adventure seekers, professional guides demonstrating expertise
elements.scene: Dramatic natural environments - cliffs, rapids, mountain peaks, canyons, extreme terrain
elements.motion: High-speed action, dynamic body movements, equipment in motion, environmental elements (water spray, dust, snow)
elements.lighting: Bright natural light for clarity, lens flares for energy, backlighting for drama during jumps/tricks
elements.atmosphere: Exhilarating, intense, showcasing human achievement against nature
elements.style: Red Bull Media House meets GoPro cinematography with cinematic production value

modifiedElements.scene: Ocean, rivers, waterfalls - surfing, kayaking, diving
modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Underwater housings, jet ski tracking, drone over water
modifiedElements.lighting: Underwater lighting considerations, spray and refraction effects

bestPractices: Safety team and protocols essential for crew and talent
Multiple cameras for safety - never rely on single take
Weather windows crucial for optimal conditions
Backup gear for extreme environment failures

examples.sampleOutput: Heart-pounding action sequence showcasing adventure sport with cinematic quality and multiple dynamic angles

templates.title: Luxury Resort Tour
templates.description: Sophisticated showcase of high-end resort amenities, experiences, and lifestyle with aspirational cinematography

prompt.main: Luxurious resort showcase video highlighting world-class amenities and experiences. Open with aerial approach over pristine landscape/seascape, revealing resort nestled in paradise. Transition to ground-level with elegant tracking shot through lobby - chandelier sparkle, marble reflections, staff greeting with orchids. Glide through spaces: suite reveal with ocean view, champagne pour on private balcony, silk curtains billowing. Showcase experiences - couple's spa treatment with hot stone close-ups, chef preparing gourmet dish with flame flourish, infinity pool merging with horizon at sunset. Include lifestyle moments - morning yoga on beach, private dinner setup, yacht departure. End with couple toasting at golden hour, pull back to reveal entire resort glowing in twilight.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth gimbal movements, elegant crane shots, subtle slider pushes, aerial reveals
elements.subject: Luxury amenities, high-end experiences, elegant spaces, professional staff, happy guests
elements.scene: Pristine resort locations - suites, restaurants, spas, pools, beaches, exclusive areas
elements.motion: Graceful service movements, gentle water ripples, fabric flowing, champagne bubbles rising
elements.lighting: Soft, flattering light throughout - golden hour for romance, bright for energy, candlelight for intimacy
elements.style: Condé Nast Traveler meets Four Seasons brand cinematography

modifiedElements.scene: Overwater bungalows, beach bars, water sports, marine activities
modifiedElements.lighting: Tropical bright light, underwater shots, sunset emphasis
modifiedElements.motion: Ocean waves, palm fronds, sailing elements

modifiedElements.scene: Fireplace lounges, ski slopes, alpine spa, forest views
modifiedElements.atmosphere: Cozy luxury, winter wonderland, aprés-ski elegance
modifiedElements.lighting: Warm interior lights contrasting cool mountain light

bestPractices: Stage scenes during optimal light - blue hour for architecture, golden hour for lifestyle
Use models who embody target demographic naturally
Attention to detail - every frame should feel premium
Coordinate with resort for exclusive access times

examples.sampleOutput: Sophisticated resort showcase evoking desire for luxury escape with every frame

templates.title: Local Market Exploration
templates.description: Vibrant sensory journey through authentic local markets capturing colors, textures, flavors, and human connections

prompt.main: Sensory-rich market exploration video immersing viewers in local culture. Open with pre-dawn vendor arrivals - steam rising from tea, crates unloading, first light hitting colorful produce. Build energy as market comes alive - rapid montage of hands exchanging money, scales balancing, knives chopping. Dive into details with macro shots - spice pyramids, textile patterns, exotic fruit cross-sections. Follow charismatic vendor interactions, capture genuine smiles and animated negotiations. Weave through narrow aisles with steadicam, revealing hidden sections - flower garlands, street food sizzling, artisan crafts. Include tasting moments - eyes widening at first bite of local delicacy. Climax with overview shot showing market's organized chaos. Close with satisfied customer departing with treasures as day winds down.

elements.cameraMovement: Handheld for energy, macro sliders for details, weaving steadicam through crowds
elements.subject: Local vendors, fresh products, traditional crafts, authentic interactions, cultural diversity
elements.scene: Bustling market environments - covered bazaars, street markets, floating markets, night markets
elements.motion: Constant activity - chopping, weighing, bargaining, crowds flowing, steam rising
elements.lighting: Mixed natural and practical lighting, emphasizing colors and textures
elements.atmosphere: Vibrant, authentic, sensory overload, culturally immersive
elements.style: Street photography in motion, Humans of New York meets Chef's Table

technicalSpecs.frameRate: 24 fps with 60fps for food prep details

modifiedElements.subject: Street food preparation, local delicacies, cooking processes
modifiedElements.cameraMovement: More static shots for cooking details

modifiedElements.subject: Artisans at work, traditional crafts being made

bestPractices: Arrive early for best light and vendor cooperation
Small crew to avoid disrupting market flow
Prime lens for low light and shallow depth
Research market customs and photography permissions

examples.sampleOutput: Energetic market journey making viewers feel the atmosphere through vivid imagery and authentic moments

templates.title: Historical Site Cinematic Tour
templates.description: Epic cinematic journey through ancient monuments and historical sites with dramatic storytelling

prompt.main: Cinematic historical site exploration revealing ancient grandeur and hidden details. Open with misty dawn aerial circling monument, sun rays breaking through ancient stones. Transition to ground level - tracking shot following archaeologist/guide's footsteps on worn stone paths. Reveal architectural marvels with crane shots showcasing impossible engineering. Explore intimate details - hieroglyphs emerging from shadows, weathered sculptures in raking light, ancient frescoes with color still visible. Use light shafts through windows/openings for drama. Include human elements for scale - silhouetted figure dwarfed by massive columns. Build mystery with hidden chambers, secret passages revealed. Intercut day/night shots showing site's different moods. Climax with golden hour hero shot of entire complex. End with stars time-lapse over ancient stones, connecting past to present.

elements.cameraMovement: Majestic crane shots, steady tracking through corridors, drone reveals, time-lapse motion
elements.subject: Ancient architecture, historical artifacts, archaeological details, monument grandeur
elements.scene: UNESCO sites, ancient temples, castles, ruins, archaeological wonders
elements.motion: Light and shadow play, tourist flow patterns, fabric/flags in wind, clouds over monuments
elements.lighting: Golden hour for warmth, blue hour for mystery, controlled lighting for interior details
elements.atmosphere: Awe-inspiring, mysterious, connecting past and present
elements.style: BBC documentary meets Indiana Jones cinematography

modifiedElements.scene: Petra, Angkor Wat, Machu Picchu style locations
modifiedElements.lighting: Emphasis on natural erosion, vegetation interplay

bestPractices: Research site restrictions and optimal visiting times
Hire local archaeological guide for accuracy
Use permits for drone/special equipment usage
Protect equipment from ancient dust/humidity

examples.sampleOutput: Breathtaking cinematic journey making ancient sites feel alive and mysterious

templates.title: Beach Paradise Aerial Views
templates.description: Stunning aerial cinematography showcasing pristine beaches, crystal waters, and tropical paradise from bird's eye perspective

prompt.main: Breathtaking aerial beach paradise showcase with crystal-clear waters and pristine sands. Open with high altitude establishing shot - atoll or coastline revealing impossible blue gradients. Descend slowly, revealing water clarity - coral formations visible through turquoise shallows, schools of fish creating patterns. Low altitude tracking along wave break, spray sparkling in sunlight. Orbit around beach activities - colorful umbrellas dotting sand, beach volleyball, kayakers in clear water. Reveal hidden coves with dramatic pullback moves. Fly through palm trees at beach level, creating dynamic foreground. Include wildlife - flamingos in lagoon, sea turtles in shallows. Capture beach life - footprints in sand, hammock between palms, beach bar with tropical drinks. End with sunset flight, silhouetting palm skyline against orange sky, final shot pulling up to show entire paradise coastline glowing.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth drone movements - orbits, reveals, bird's eye downs, low altitude racing
elements.subject: Pristine beaches, clear waters, tropical landscapes, beach activities, marine life
elements.scene: Tropical beaches, hidden coves, coral reefs, palm-lined shores, beach resorts
elements.motion: Wave patterns, palm frond movement, wildlife activity, water sports action
elements.lighting: Bright tropical sun for water clarity, golden hour for warmth, polarizing for water detail
elements.atmosphere: Paradise found, tropical escape, pristine nature
elements.style: Planet Earth meets luxury travel drone cinematography

modifiedElements.scene: Cliff-backed beaches, rock formations, crashing waves

bestPractices: Check drone regulations and no-fly zones
Monitor battery levels for over-water flights
Use ND filters for proper exposure in bright conditions
Plan flights around tide schedules for best water clarity

examples.sampleOutput: Stunning aerial journey showcasing beach paradise from perspectives impossible to see from ground

templates.title: City Nightlife Energy
templates.description: High-energy urban nightlife montage capturing city's after-dark personality with neon lights and vibrant culture

prompt.main: Electric city nightlife energy video pulsing with urban rhythm. Open with sunset time-lapse - city lights awakening as sky darkens, windows illuminating like stars. Cut to street level - neon signs flickering to life, reflections in rain-slicked streets. Fast-paced montage: cocktail shakers in rooftop bars, DJ hands on turntables, dancers in strobe lights. Capture diverse nightlife - food trucks with steam rising, late-night ramen shops, street performers under streetlights. Weave through entertainment districts with hyperlapse, neon colors streaking past. Include cultural elements - night markets, outdoor cinema, art gallery openings. Show human connections - friends laughing, couples dancing, strangers becoming friends. Build energy with quick cuts matching music beat. Climax with aerial shot of entire city pulsing with life. End with dawn breaking, last revelers heading home as city resets.

elements.cameraMovement: Hyperlapse through streets, handheld for clubs, smooth gimbal for walking shots, drone for cityscapes
elements.subject: Nightlife venues, street culture, entertainment districts, diverse crowds, neon signage
elements.scene: Urban entertainment areas, rooftop bars, night markets, clubs, late-night eateries
elements.motion: Constant movement - crowds, traffic, lights flashing, dance movements
elements.lighting: Neon colors, street lights, club strobes, practical sources creating atmosphere
elements.atmosphere: Electric, vibrant, culturally diverse, never-sleeping energy
elements.style: Enter the Void meets Lost in Translation with modern social media energy

modifiedElements.subject: Traditional evening entertainment, cultural performances
modifiedElements.scene: Theaters, traditional music venues, cultural districts
Alternative venues, street art locations, indie spots
modifiedElements.lighting: Less polished, more realistic street lighting

bestPractices: Use fast lenses and capable low-light cameras
Build relationships with venue owners for access
Be respectful of people's privacy in nightlife settings
Plan routes to maximize variety in limited time

examples.sampleOutput: Pulsing nightlife montage that captures city's after-dark personality and energy

templates.title: Natural Wonder Documentation
templates.description: Epic nature cinematography documenting geological wonders, unique ecosystems, and natural phenomena

prompt.main: Majestic natural wonder documentation revealing Earth's raw power and beauty. Open with pre-dawn approach - silhouette of [natural feature] against lightening sky. First light reveals impossible scale and grandeur. Showcase geological story through visual journey - ancient rock layers, erosion patterns, unique formations. Include wildlife inhabiting this ecosystem - eagles soaring thermals, rare plants clinging to cliffs. Capture phenomena specific to location - geysers erupting, aurora dancing, bioluminescence glowing. Use time-lapse for dynamic elements - clouds flowing like rivers, shadows racing across canyons, stars wheeling overhead. Include human element for scale but keep minimal - tiny hiker on vast glacier, kayaker in massive fjord. Build to climactic moment - sunrise through arch, waterfall rainbow, storm clearing to reveal peak. End with pullback showing wonder in full environmental context.

elements.cameraMovement: Slow aerial reveals, stable tripod for time-lapse, slider moves for parallax depth
elements.subject: Geological formations, unique ecosystems, natural phenomena, endemic wildlife
elements.scene: National parks, geological wonders, unique biomes, remote natural locations
elements.motion: Natural forces - water, wind, geological activity, weather patterns, wildlife
elements.lighting: Magic hour emphasis, weather drama, natural phenomena illumination
elements.style: National Geographic meets BBC Planet Earth with IMAX sensibility

modifiedElements.subject: Active volcanos, lava flows, geothermal features
modifiedElements.motion: Lava movement, steam vents, volcanic activity

bestPractices: Research optimal seasons for specific phenomena
Prepare for extreme conditions with backup gear
Respect wilderness regulations and leave no trace
Allow multiple days for weather windows

examples.sampleOutput: Breathtaking documentation of natural wonder that makes viewers feel they're experiencing it firsthand

templates.title: Travel Lifestyle Montage
templates.description: Aspirational travel lifestyle compilation showcasing the journey, experiences, and transformative moments of travel

prompt.main: Inspirational travel lifestyle montage capturing the soul of wanderlust. Open with packing sequence - hands folding map, passport stamps, vintage camera. Transition to journey - feet on various terrains, train windows with landscapes rushing by, airplane wing over clouds. Capture authentic travel moments: morning coffee in Parisian café, journaling by mountain lake, locals teaching traditional dance. Include solo reflection - silhouette against sunset, meditation at temple, stargazing in desert. Show connections - sharing meal with new friends, children teaching games, elder sharing stories. Adventure snippets - jumping into waterfall, market haggling, getting lost and finding magic. Build emotional arc from departure excitement through challenges to transformation. Include sensory details - hands touching ancient walls, feet in different waters, faces reacting to new flavors. End with return home - unpacking treasures, photos spreading, but eyes already dreaming of next adventure.

elements.cameraMovement: Mix of stable beauty shots and dynamic handheld moments, smooth transitions between locations
elements.subject: Solo travelers, couples, authentic interactions, diverse destinations, travel rituals
elements.scene: Iconic and hidden locations worldwide, transportation modes, accommodation varieties
elements.motion: Journey progression, natural movements, candid moments, transitional elements
elements.lighting: Natural light throughout day, practical sources, golden hour for emotional moments
elements.style: Travel vlogger authenticity meets cinematic production value

bestPractices: Capture throughout entire trip for authentic arc
Mix planned shots with spontaneous moments
Include both highs and challenges for authenticity
Focus on emotions and connections over locations

examples.sampleOutput: Emotionally resonant travel montage that inspires viewers to book their next adventure
